headline: Paramount Skydance Deal Reshapes Warner Bros Discovery Outlook After Netflix Exit
summary: Paramount Skydance has signed a definitive agreement to acquire Warner Bros. Discovery, setting the stage for a major media merger. Netflix has formally withdrawn its competing bid after extensive regulatory and political scrutiny of potential deals. The transaction includes plans to combine streaming offerings while keeping key cable networks under the new corporate umbrella. Political reactions, anticipated regulatory review, executive share sales and possible job cuts are already in focus...

headline: Disney bets big on the Asian market with Adventure cruise ship
summary: Disney cruises is going bigger than ever with the launch of the 6,700-passenger Disney Adventure, its largest ship and the first to set sail from the Asian market. The ship will embark on three- and four-night voyages from Singapore starting later this month and features immersive experiences inspired by Marvel, Frozen, Toy Story and more. CNBC's Sarah Whitten breaks down Disney's cruise expansion and its global aspirations for its Experiences business.

headline: Assessing Netflix (NFLX) Valuation After A Sharp Rebound And Mixed Return Profile
summary: Recent share performance and business snapshot Netflix (NFLX) has drawn attention after a 25.19% move over the past week, building on a 17.02% gain over the past month, even as the past 3 months show a 6.02% decline.
